prompt: Take the reference UI screenshot and produce a CLEANED BACKGROUND PLATE / FRAME-ONLY version. KEEP ONLY these structural framing elements: (1) the ornate golden-metal outer decorative frame with floral/leaf corner ornaments and the teal/jade-green stone inner frame edge; (2) the small teal/green title-bar strip at the very top center; (3) the large warm cream/beige parchment main background panel that fills the central area — keep its subtle paper texture but make it a CLEAN UNIFORM empty surface. REMOVE / ERASE COMPLETELY all of the following, replacing those areas seamlessly with the matching cream parchment texture: all Chinese text characters and any other text; the large teal phoenix shield banner on the left; the candlestick/stock chart and ALL grid lines in the middle area; the two horizontal scroll/rope UI strips at the bottom (showing 盟主/成员); the prosperity/繁荣度 bar and arrow button; the three bottom-row buttons (gear, network, door icons) and the small arrow icon at bottom-right; all decorative gold coins; the golden wax seal and rope on the right side; the member avatars circle. The final output should look like a pristine empty game UI panel template: just the golden+jade frame with empty title bar at top and large empty cream parchment area in the middle, ready for new content to be placed inside. Preserve the original aspect ratio, lighting, shading, and the frame's exact ornamental detailing. Transparent background outside the frame (keep only the frame and its content area). ONE SINGLE clean UI frame, no text, no logos, no watermark.
